title: 2026 power unit rules in effect
summary: Fully sustainable fuels and revised energy deployment limits apply from this season. Teams must balance electrical and combustion output across each lap.

title: Driver line-up changes
summary: Several teams confirmed new driver pairings for 2026. Check the Drivers page for the full season grid once entries are published.

title: Floor and wing adjustments
summary: Aero regulations were tweaked to reduce dirty air. Expect closer racing in the first races as teams adapt setup windows.

title: Live console coverage
summary: UnderCut live timing activates automatically during session weekends. Standings and results update after each race is classified.
